parts.text: 移除这个项目下与项目无关的内容，之前用于排查codex异常会话日志，生成了很多临时脚本和日志目录；

Turn summary:
- User cleaned up project `glm_code_plan_status_plugs` by removing temporary scripts and log directories created during Codex anomaly session log debugging
- Identified temporary content: numbered shell scripts (`01_basic_info.sh`, `02_dangerous_patterns.sh`, etc.), `reports/` directory with HTML audit report, `audit_logs/` directory with empty/partial log files, and timestamped directories like `extracttracted_tool_calls_20260416_*`
- All temporary artifacts were generated on 2026-04-16 for debugging Codex session anomalies and are not part of the project's core functionality

Assistant excerpt:

Turn summary:
- User requested cleanup of temporary files in `glm_code_plan_status_plugs` project, keeping only the `reports` directory
- Removed audit shell scripts (01-07_*.sh), temporary log directories (`audit_logs`, `extracted_tool_calls_*`), and temporary documentation files
- Verified cleanup left `reports/` directory and core project files intact (bin/, total 56 items remaining)

帮我卸载我的codex,以及所有关联的文件记录，还有配置文件！

Turn summary:
- 用户请求完全卸载 OpenAI Codex CLI 工具及其所有关联文件
- Codex 安装方式为 npm 全局包 `@openai/codex@0.121.0`，位于 nvm 管理的 Node v24.11.1 下
- 配置目录在 `~/.codex/`，包含 AGENTS.md、auth.json、会话历史等文件
- 卸载步骤：`npm uninstall -g @openai/codex` → `rm -rf ~/.codex`
- 验证确认：codex 命令已不存在，npm 全局无残留包，`~/.codex` 目录已删除
- shell 配置文件（~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc）中未发现 codex 相关引用，无需清理

Assistant excerpt:
我来帮你完全卸载 codex 及其所有关联文件和配置。 [tool-use] Bash({"command": "which codex", "description": "Find codex executable location"}) [tool-use] Bash({"command": "ls -la ~/.codex 2>/dev/null || echo \"~/.codex not found\"", "description": "Check .codex directory"}) [tool-use] Bash({"command": "ls -la ~/.config/codex 2>/dev/null || echo \"~/.config/codex not found\"", "description": "Check codex config directory"}) [tool-use] Bash({"command": "npm list -g @anthropic-ai/codex 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not found in npm global\"", "description": "Check if codex installed via npm"}) [tool-result] /home/yuxs/.nvm/versions/node/v24.11.1/bin/codex [tool-result] ~/.config/codex not found [tool-result] 总计 16000 drwxrwxr-x 12 yuxs yuxs 4096 4月 16 15:28 . drwxr-x--- 91 yuxs yuxs 4096 4月 16 15:55 .. -rw-rw-r-- 1 yuxs yuxs 1083 3月 18 17:12 AGENTS.md -rw-rw-r-- 1 yuxs yuxs 28 3月 17 11:35 auth.json -rw-rw-r-- 1 yuxs yuxs ...
